meta.purpose: Examples that show judgment structure rather than scripts.
meta.load_condition: Load when examples, transformation patterns, or before/after critique are needed.

cases.brief: User says 'add animation to the hero section.'
cases.bad_pattern: Agent immediately generates a 12-element staggered entrance with bounce easing, floating background particles, and a rotating CTA. Result: chaotic, cheap-feeling, impossible to review beat by beat.
cases.master_pattern: Agent responds with a brief: 'Primary subject: headline. Attention path: headline → subtitle → CTA, in sequence. Emotional tone: confident and calm. Duration: ~800ms total. Assumptions: desktop-first, brand prefers restraint, primary CTA is the conversion goal.' Human approves. Agent generates 3-beat sequence. Human reviews. Agent refines.

cases.brief: Agent generates a mobile animation with 6 simultaneous motion groups.
cases.bad_pattern: Agent silently assumed desktop performance. The animation runs at 18fps on mid-range phones. The assumption was never stated so it was never challenged.
cases.master_pattern: Agent states assumption: 'Assuming M1+ desktop hardware with dedicated GPU. If target device is mid-range mobile, I will reduce simultaneous motion groups from 6 to 2.' Human clarifies: target is iPhone 12 and above. Agent adjusts the brief and regenerates.
